keyEvents.text: Goal! Bermuda 0, Jamaica 1. Damion Lowe (Jamaica) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner following a corner.
Goal! Bermuda 0, Jamaica 2. Renaldo Cephas (Jamaica) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Greg Leigh with a headed pass following a fast break.
Isaac Hayden (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bermuda. Keziah Martin replaces Willie Clemons.
Goal! Bermuda 0, Jamaica 3. Kasey Palmer (Jamaica) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jon Russell.
Substitution, Jamaica. Karoy Anderson replaces Kasey Palmer.

Substitution, Bermuda. Justin Donawa replaces Reggie Lambe.

Shamar Nicholson (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
